chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8163 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.12305/2023. 2. For hearing of CMA No.34409/2022. 3. For hearing of CMA No.34408/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 22.05.2025 Barrister Syed Ali Ahmed Zaidi, advocate for the petitioners. Chaudhry Arif Majeed, advocate for the respondent No.5. Mr. Mansoor Ali Ghanghro, advocate for the respondent No.8. Mr. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. The present petition apprehends, inter alia, environmental degradation consequent to a bio-gas plant being conceived in their vicinity. Learned counsel for the respondent No.8 states that no such plant is presently under construction and the concept is still under deliberation. He states that under such circumstances, the petition is, prima facie, premature. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied with the representation so extended, however, states that apprehension of residents may be entertained and determined by the respondents prior to any such project being implemented. Learned counsel for the respondent No.8 states that any application made in such regard shall be determined in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the applicant/s. It is jointly stated that this petition may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
